title: poa botryoides
intro: Poa botryoides, also known as the bottlebrush grass or bottlebrush poa, is a type of grass native to New Zealand and Australia. The medicinal properties of Poa botryoides include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Poa botryoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Poa botryoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
